full_text:
Li Feng (Anguo) 李豐 (安國)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Feng (李豐), styledAnguo (安國). Famed from a young age, had a habit of faking illness. Plotted against Sima Shi. Li Feng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Feng lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
